verse_text: Then he said, 'The God of our fathers has chosen you that you should know His will, and see the Just One, and hear the voice of His mouth.

links.context: God's revelation to Paul began on the road to Damascus ([[ACT.22:3]]-21). God was gracious to Paul not for his own sake but for others (see [[ACT.9:15]], [[ACT.9:16]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
